who: finance officers at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month
offer: For finance officers at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month, manual tracking causes delays in compliance reporting. We automate reconciliation reporting instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
problem: Inaccurate or delayed trust account reconciliation reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for finance officers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to finance officers with demo video
Participate in community forums for finance tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for initial data input and monthly report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
